tagline: Patient records, SOAP notes, triage scenarios
demo_narrative: Where does this patient data go? Right here on this device. Nowhere else. No BAA required, no cloud compliance review, no PHI ever leaves the room.

schema.name: synthetic_patient_records
schema.description: Synthetic patient encounters. Contains no real PHI.

columns.name: history_of_present_illness
columns.system_prompt: You are a clinical documentation assistant writing structured HPI sections. Use precise clinical language. No real names. Output only the HPI paragraph - no headers, no preamble.
columns.prompt: Write a 3-4 sentence HPI for a {{ age }}-year-old {{ sex }} presenting to {{ encounter_type }} with chief complaint {{ chief_complaint_category }}. Acuity {{ acuity_score }}/5. Include onset, quality, severity, associated symptoms, and pertinent negatives.

columns.name: assessment_and_plan
columns.system_prompt: Clinical documentation assistant. Output A: 2 bullets, P: 3 bullets. Concise.
columns.prompt:
Given this HPI: {{ history_of_present_illness }}

Write an Assessment and Plan. Use this format exactly:
A:
- bullet 1
- bullet 2
P:
- bullet 1
- bullet 2
- bullet 3
